requirement_topic.en: Load-Shedding-Driven Residential and C&I Storage Boom
requirement_topic.zh: 停电限电驱动的户用及工商业储能增长
requirement_topic.zht: 停電限電驅動的戶用及工商業儲能增長

summary.en: South Africa's electricity-supply constraints and load shedding have increased demand for residential and commercial-and-industrial backup power, PV hybrid systems, inverters, and battery storage. Fast-moving sales do not remove compliance duties: importers still need to control product identity, manuals, labels, electrical installation evidence, grid-connection permissions where relevant, transport documents, and any NRCS LOA obligations for regulated components.
summary.zh: 南非电力供应约束和限电提高了户用及工商业备用电源、光储混合系统、逆变器和电池储能需求。快速增长的销售并不免除合规义务：进口商仍须控制产品身份、说明书、标签、电气安装证据、适用时的并网许可、运输文件，以及受监管部件的任何NRCS LOA义务。
summary.zht: 南非電力供應約束和限電提高了戶用及工商業備用電源、光儲混合系統、逆變器和電池儲能需求。快速增長的銷售並不免除合規義務：進口商仍須控制產品身份、說明書、標籤、電氣安裝證據、適用時的併網許可、運輸文件，以及受監管部件的任何NRCS LOA義務。

standards_or_laws: South African electricity system and load-shedding context
NRCS, SANS / IEC, grid-connection, transport, and installation requirements where applicable

summary.en: A China export file often includes GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, UN 38.3, PCS reports, user manuals, and factory quality records. For South Africa, the same file should be reorganised by SKU and project so that LOA scope, IEC / SANS evidence, NRS 097 data, and installation documents all describe the same configuration. A proposed update to GB/T 36558-2023 with a claimed 2024-07-01 implementation date was not verified against an official source for this row, so the existing 2022 reference is retained.
summary.zh: 中国出口资料包通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、UN 38.3、PCS报告、用户手册和工厂质量记录。面向南非时，应按SKU和项目重组同一资料包，使LOA适用范围、IEC / SANS证据、NRS 097数据和安装文件均描述同一配置。关于GB/T 36558-2023及其声称2024-07-01实施日期的拟议更新，本行未能通过官方来源核验，因此保留现有2022引用。
summary.zht: 中國出口資料包通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、UN 38.3、PCS報告、使用者手冊和工廠品質記錄。面向南非時，應按SKU和項目重組同一資料包，使LOA適用範圍、IEC / SANS證據、NRS 097資料和安裝文件均描述同一配置。關於GB/T 36558-2023及其聲稱2024-07-01實施日期的擬議更新，本行未能通過官方來源核驗，因此保留現有2022引用。

gap.en: The commercial risk is that emergency demand can push products into market with incomplete configuration control. Exporters should maintain a controlled compliance matrix covering cell supplier, battery model, BMS version, inverter or PCS model, firmware, enclosure, manuals, labels, transport configuration, and installation limits.
gap.zh: 商业风险在于应急需求可能推动配置控制不完整的产品进入市场。出口商应维护受控合规矩阵，覆盖电芯供应商、电池型号、BMS版本、逆变器或PCS型号、固件、外壳、说明书、标签、运输配置和安装限制。
gap.zht: 商業風險在於應急需求可能推動配置控制不完整的產品進入市場。出口商應維護受控合規矩陣，覆蓋電芯供應商、電池型號、BMS版本、逆變器或PCS型號、韌體、外殼、說明書、標籤、運輸配置和安裝限制。

mandatory_status.target: Market demand is not a legal approval route; underlying NRCS, grid, transport, electrical, fire, and contractual requirements remain mandatory where they apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese domestic certification, export transport, grid, and fire-review scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Load-shedding demand may explain market urgency, but it does not replace LOA scope review, IEC / SANS evidence, NRS 097 connection approval, UN 38.3 transport documents, or installation safety review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 限电需求可以解释市场紧迫性，但不能替代LOA适用范围审查、IEC / SANS证据、NRS 097并网批准、UN 38.3运输文件或安装安全审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 限電需求可以解釋市場緊迫性，但不能替代LOA適用範圍審查、IEC / SANS證據、NRS 097併網批准、UN 38.3運輸文件或安裝安全審查。
